nasb.text: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old; and she bore him Segub.

esv.text: Afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was sixty years old, and she bore him Segub.

cnv.text: 後來希斯崙在六十歲的時候，娶了基列的父親瑪吉的女兒，與她同房，她就給他生了西割。

ccb.text: 希斯仑六十岁娶玛吉的女儿，与她生了西割。玛吉是基列的父亲。
